agent_content_hints.rationale: PRD F2.2/F2.3: retrieval-lift evidence deferred to Phase 6

caveats: Single corpus, single grader architecture, single run.
Four pillars carry zero headline weight in v2; still reported as diagnostics.
Profile-specific weights collapse to the same 2-pillar composite pending corpus-003.

Cross-judge accuracy variance: per-judge corpus-002 means span 0.591-0.698 across Llama-3.3-70B, GPT-4o, and DeepSeek-V3.2 (pooled kappa 0.706-0.817). The v2 composite-vs-accuracy Pearson r ranges from +0.440 to +0.618 across judges (all above the +0.35 ship gate). Report majority-vote CI [0.567, 0.688] or per-judge union CI [0.530, 0.758] when comparing across studies.
